result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Search results page on Allrecipes for “breakfast smoothie with spinach,” scrolled partway down; a grid of recipe cards is visible.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Allrecipes”; “SMOOTHIE RECIPES”; “14 Breakfast Smoothie Recipes to Start Your Day the Healthy Way”; “DRINKS”; “Kale and Berries Breakfast Smoothie”; “21 Ratings”
selected_candidate:
Kale and Berries Breakfast Smoothie
constraint_evidence:
- breakfast smoothie recipe: supported (search results and visible smoothie recipe cards)
- contains spinach: not_visible
- contains bananas: not_visible
- at least four-star rating: supported (visible star row appears 4+ stars for “Kale and Berries Breakfast Smoothie”)
- over 25 reviews/ratings: contradicted (visible “21 Ratings”)
- on Allrecipes: supported (site header/logo and URL/title context)
action_target:
Scroll down to reveal more search results, especially recipes that mention spinach and bananas and have >25 ratings.
success_signals:
A result card explicitly mentioning spinach and bananas appears, with 4+ stars and more than 25 ratings/reviews.
failure_signals:
Only unrelated smoothie cards remain visible, or candidate results show fewer than 26 ratings/reviews.
uncertainty:
The visible star count is approximate from the screenshot; the exact ingredient list for each card is not visible, so spinach/banana presence cannot be confirmed here.

args.query: possible early termination after finding a candidate recipe result on Allrecipes; task required spinach and bananas, at least 4 stars, and over 25 reviews

items.summary: The agent exited before reaching a page state that satisfies the task.
items.fix_hint: Require a final evidence check that the requested information or state is visible before sending an exit message.

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

args.query: Allrecipes recipe search task where agent stopped after seeing a promising result but did not verify banana ingredient, rating, and review count

args.task: navigate: Locate a breakfast smoothie recipe on Allrecipes that contains spinach and bananas, has at least a four-star rating, and over 25 reviews.

evidence.claim: The run reached an Allrecipes recipe detail page for 'Breakfast Banana Green Smoothie' showing 4.6 stars and 37 reviews.
The task required a breakfast smoothie recipe on Allrecipes that contains spinach and bananas, has at least a four-star rating, and over 25 reviews.
The screenshot evidence for the final candidate did not visibly confirm spinach in the ingredient list; the high-detail summary explicitly marks spinach as not visible and notes uncertainty.
The agent sent an exit message after reaching this candidate instead of verifying the spinach constraint.
A similar failure pattern is documented in memory case fm_missed_constraint_001: hard constraints must be verified against the final page state before returning success.

args.expected_behavior: Verify a recipe that explicitly satisfies all task constraints, including visible confirmation that the recipe contains spinach and bananas, plus at least four stars and more than 25 reviews, before exiting.
args.actual_behavior: The agent stopped on a plausible banana smoothie candidate with sufficient rating/reviews, but did not confirm the spinach constraint before sending an exit message.
args.regression_rule: Do not end a search task on a plausible candidate unless every user-specified constraint has been explicitly verified in the observed page state or screenshots; if any hard constraint remains unconfirmed, continue searching or inspect the recipe details.

suggested_followups.label: Inspect step 7 in detail
suggested_followups.message: Show the high-detail evidence for the final recipe page and why spinach was not confirmed.

suggested_followups.label: Review failure pattern
suggested_followups.message: Summarize the similar failure memory about missing hard constraints before exiting.
